news.Title: Chevron-Microsoft Deal Powers $7B Texas AI Energy Project
news.Content:
Chevron Corporation CVX, Microsoft Corporation MSFT and investment firm Engine No. 1 are in exclusive talks to secure a long-term electricity supply for a massive data center campus in West Texas. The agreement would underpin a proposed natural gas-fired power plant designed to meet the growing energy needs of AI-driven infrastructure. Notably, Microsoft has already agreed to lease a Texas data center project initially intended for Oracle and OpenAI. During its annual Investor Day in November, Chevron had stated that its first natural gas-powered project to supply an AI data center will be developed in West Texas, with operations targeted to begin by 2027.

A $7B Energy Bet in the Permian Basin

The proposed facility is expected to cost about $7 billion and generate an initial 2,500 megawatts (MW) of electricity, making it one of the largest power plants of its kind in the United States. Located near Pecos, close to the Texas-New Mexico border, the project sits in the heart of the Permian Basin — an area rich in natural gas supply.

The region often produces excess natural gas as a by-product of oil extraction, much of which is flared due to pipeline constraints. This makes it an ideal location for a large-scale power generation project.

Exclusivity Deal: A Key De-Risking Catalyst

While no definitive agreement has been finalized, the exclusivity arrangement serves as a critical step forward. It provides a negotiation window and signals Microsoft’s intent to become a long-term anchor customer.

This potential offtake commitment is crucial. By securing a high-credit buyer for its electricity, the project significantly reduces financial uncertainty. It enhances the plant’s credit profile, making it easier to secure construction financing and transforming it from a speculative venture into a more bankable asset.

How the Partnership Strengthens Execution

Chevron, currently carrying a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), and Engine No. 1 had already partnered to develop scalable power solutions for data centers. Their plan includes the use of seven U.S.-made GE Vernova Inc. GEV 7HA natural gas turbines to deliver the plant’s initial capacity. GEV’s natural gas turbines were intended to serve the data centers in the Southeast, Midwest and West regions of the country. GEV is a leading energy equipment manufacturer and services provider, which is scheduled to deliver the turbines in 2026.

Microsoft’s involvement completes the value chain — linking fuel supply, power generation and end-user demand. However, the project still requires tax and environmental approvals, along with finalized commercial terms, before reaching a final investment decision.

Story Continues

You can see the complete list of today’s Zacks #1 Rank (Strong Buy) stocks here.

AI Boom Fuels Power Demand Surge

The deal comes amid a rapid increase in electricity demand driven by AI and data centers. Tech companies are aggressively securing power sources to support generative AI workloads.

In Texas alone, data centers are expected to drive nearly half of future electricity demand growth. Current demand stands at around 8 gigawatts and is projected to rise sharply, pushing the state’s grid capacity toward 150 gigawatts by 2030.

Competing in a High-Stakes Energy Race

Chevron’s project is part of a broader wave of large-scale energy developments in Texas. Nearly 40 gigawatts of new gas-fired power capacity is planned, much of it aimed at directly powering data centers.

Major competing projects, such as Pacifico Energy’s 7.65 GW Ranch development in Pecos County, highlight the scale and urgency of this buildout.

CVX's Behind-the-Meter Strategy Offers Competitive Edge

A defining feature of Chevron’s project is its “behind-the-meter” design. This approach allows the plant to supply electricity directly to a data center campus, bypassing the traditional power grid.

This model ensures a reliable, dedicated energy source for hyperscale clients like Microsoft while avoiding grid congestion. It also enables Chevron to integrate its Permian Basin gas production directly into power generation, creating a closed-loop system with strong economic advantages.

The Road Ahead

Although still in the negotiation phase, the exclusivity agreement marks a significant milestone. With Microsoft as a potential anchor customer, the project gains momentum toward overcoming regulatory and financial hurdles.

If finalized, the deal would not only secure energy for Microsoft’s AI ambitions but also position Chevron at the center of the rapidly evolving intersection of energy and technology.

That said, things are starting to change as a new generation of military contractors starts to blur ...

• The company's 2025 revenue was $309,920, down 6% from 2024, with modest gross margins of under 39%.

news.Title: Applied Materials Stock Climbs 33% YTD: Time to Buy, Sell or Hold?
news.Content:
Applied Materials AMAT shares have climbed 33% year to date, outperforming the Zacks Electronics - Semiconductors industry and the Zacks Computer and Technology sector’s decline 5.5% and 11.5%, respectively.

AMAT YTD Performance Chart

Image Source: Zacks Investment Research

This outperformance has led AMAT stock to trade at a premium of 8.08X price-to-sales (P/S) multiple compared to the industry’s P/S multiple of 6.71X. AMAT’s premium valuation has been further implied by the Zacks Value Score of D.

AMAT Forward 12 Month (P/S) Valuation Chart

Considering the current overvaluation and the sharp rise in share prices, investors want to know if it is the right time to buy, sell or hold the stock? Let’s discuss the financials and fundamentals of the company to understand what you should do with AMAT stock.

Demand for Logic, DRAM and Packaging Drives AMAT’s WFE

Applied Materials expects its leading-edge foundry, logic, DRAM and high-bandwidth memory (HBM) to be the fastest-growing wafer fabrication equipment (WFE) businesses in 2026. In Logic, AMAT’s revenues are driven by the shift from FinFET to Gate-All-Around transistors and backside power delivery.

AMAT’s DRAM offerings are gaining traction as customers are aggressively investing in 6F² nodes supported by rising demand for high bandwidth memory DRAM, driven by AI workloads. On its first-quarter 2026 earnings call, AMAT highlighted its record growth in both Logic and DRAM segments, driven by major semiconductor transitions.

Applied Materials expects future generations of HBM to adopt hybrid bonding, and in the hybrid bonding space, AMAT is one of the leading innovators. AMAT’s advanced packaging, particularly 3D chiplet stacking, is another structural tailwind as AI chips become more heterogeneous. As chips are becoming more complex, wafer fabrication now involves multiple fabrication steps.

AMAT has the broadest and most diversified offerings as it provides solutions across multiple fabrication steps, like deposition, materials engineering, etch, metrology and packaging. While its competitors serve only one or two verticals. This has enabled AMAT to carve out a place for itself in the WFE market.

AMAT’s Broad Product Portfolio Enables it to Protect Margins

AMAT competes with KLA Corporation KLAC, Lam Research LRCX and Camtek CAMT in the WFE and testing market. Applied Materials and KLA Corporation offer similar solutions, such as Wafer Inspection, Yield Enhancement and Process Control inspection systems, while Camtek stands at the forefront of semiconductor inspection and metrology solutions.

Story Continues

Camtek is focused on high-performance computing modules, advanced packaging and silicon carbide technologies. Lam Research develops Atomic Layer Deposition tools like AT200M, AT410 and AT650P that are similar to the devices made by AMAT. While Camtek, Lam Research and KLA Corporation overlap with Applied Materials, AMAT’s broad product portfolio enables it to seamlessly integrate its equipment across multiple processes.

AMAT’s integration of equipment across multiple processes reduces reliance on any single technology cycle and enables it to price its product stack better to protect margins. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for AMAT’s fiscal 2026 earnings implies growth of 17.8%. The estimates have been revised downward in the past seven days.

Conclusion: Buy AMAT Stock Now

Applied Materials, with its broad portfolio of WFE products across deposition, materials engineering, etch, metrology, and packaging and traction across products like foundry, logic, DRAM and high-bandwidth memory, is a strong player in the semiconductor supply chain with strong opportunities. Given these conditions, we suggest that investors should buy this Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) stock at present. You can see the complete list of today’s Zacks #1 Rank (Strong Buy) stocks here .

Each of the three major U.S. stock indexes posted its best day since May last year on March 31, 2026, with the ...

• Software companies are positioned to lead recovery due to potential peace, benefiting from eased hardware constraints and restored business confidence.
• The war exacerbated chip shortages and delayed data center expansions, impacting software firms.

news.Title: Ciena's WaveLogic 6 Gains Traction With Vodafone Idea Deployment
news.Content:
Ciena Corporation ’s CIEN WaveLogic 6 Extreme (WL6e) coherent optical solution is being implemented by Vodafone Idea Limited to modernize its transport network infrastructure. The deployment is aimed at addressing the sharp rise in data traffic across India, driven by cloud adoption, AI workloads and enterprise digitization.

By leveraging WL6e on Ciena’s 6500 platform, Vodafone Idea can significantly boost network capacity and efficiency, as demonstrated by achieving speeds of up to 1.6 Tb/s on its Data Center Interconnect (DCI) network. This upgrade enables the operator to support next-generation 800G services, positioning Vodafone to meet high-bandwidth demands from hyperscalers, enterprises and emerging digital use cases.

The key benefit of this implementation is a more scalable, high-performance and future-ready network that can handle growing traffic while reducing cost per bit. WL6e also strengthens Vodafone Idea’s competitive positioning by expanding its service capabilities and unlocking new growth opportunities.

WL6e is seeing strong market adoption, attracting customers looking for more capacity while saving space and power in their networks. Ciena’s WL6e stands out as the industry’s first 1.6 Tb/s coherent optical technology, designed to maximize fiber capacity while lowering cost per bit and reducing power consumption. Ciena anticipates maintaining this lead in next-generation optical technology for at least two years. The company is progressing on industry-first wins with cloud providers. Additionally, it is expanding its customer base for coherent routing and securing deals with international service providers and enterprise clients.

In the first revenue quarter for WaveLogic 6 Nano coherent pluggable transceivers, both C-Band and L-Band variants were launched. WL6e deployments continue to ramp on AI-driven network buildouts, with 18 new customers added during the first quarter of 2026, bringing the total customer base to 90. WaveRouter’s footprint continues to expand with the addition of a new international Tier-1 provider, delivering IP connectivity across both terrestrial and submarine networks.

Taking a Look at CIEN’s Competitors

Cisco Systems, Inc. CSCO is benefiting from strong product orders from hyperscalers, enterprises, the public sector, service providers and cloud customers. The launch of AI-powered Hypershield, which combines security and networking, strengthens its security portfolio. Networking sales benefit from the strong demand for AI infrastructure and campus networking solutions. Product orders from service provider and cloud customers were strong driven by high double-digit order growth in hyperscalers. Cisco expects to take AI orders in excess of $5 billion and to recognize more than $3 billion in AI infrastructure revenue from hyperscalers in fiscal 2026. For the third quarter of fiscal 2026, Cisco expects revenues to be in the range of $15.4 billion-$15.6 billion.

Story Continues

Arista Networks, Inc. ’s ANET differentiated technology stack, including its Extensible Operating System software and high-speed Ethernet platforms, is seeing strong adoption across a wide range of use cases from 10G to 800G, with further advancements underway. The company is also benefiting from rising adoption of AI networking solutions, increasing deployments of advanced switching systems and expanding opportunities across AI, cloud and enterprise environments. Additionally, ANET’s diversification into adjacent markets such as campus networking, routing and subscription-based software and services is supporting growth. For the first quarter of 2026, management expects revenues to be approximately $2.6 billion.

CIEN Price Performance, Valuation and Estimates

Shares of CIEN have surged 154.3% in the past six months compared with the Communications - Components industry’s growth of 102%.

Image Source: Zacks Investment Research

CIEN trades at a forward 12-month price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio of 66.51, above the industry’s 44.91.

The Zacks Consensus Estimate for CIEN earnings for fiscal 2026 has been revised upward over the past 60 days.

CIEN currently sports a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy). You can see the complete list of today’s Zacks #1 Rank stocks here .

news.Title: Humanoid Robots Offer Europe Path to Stay in Tech Race
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Europe has been late to the AI boom and trails China on electric cars. But when it comes to humanoid robots, it’s still in the race. Sweden’s Hexagon AB has built a humanoid that’s being tested at industrial clients including BMW AG. Germany’s Neura Robotics GmbH just raised some €1 billion ($1.2 billion) from investors including Amazon.com Inc. and Qualcomm Inc., valuing the startup at about €4 billion. Local automotive suppliers Schaeffler AG and Robert Bosch GmbH are also betting on grabbing a share of the nascent market headlined by Tesla Inc. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Europe is testing humanoid robots, with companies like Hexagon AB and Neura Robotics raising significant capital.
• Automotive suppliers Schaeffler AG and Robert Bosch GmbH are also investing in the nascent humanoid robot market.
• Hexagon's Aeon robot is expected to surge in numbers by 2030, with full commercialization planned for 2026.
• Humanoid robots offer potential for reduced labor costs and addressing an aging demographic, but large-scale deployment may take 5-10 years.
news.Keywords: humanoid robots, industrial automation, market growth, European tech, labor costs

news.Title: 川普暗示中東衝突有望落幕　美股又開高！台積電ADR漲3%
news.Content:
即時中心／綜合報導

在美國總統川普暗示中東衝突可能落幕的氛圍下，華爾街主要指數今天開盤延續漲勢。台積電ADR漲逾3%。

news.Title: Stock Market News for Apr 1, 2026
news.Content:
Wall Street closed sharply higher on Tuesday, driven by tech and discretionary stocks. Investor mood was upbeat on reports suggesting that President Trump had signaled a willingness to end the Iran conflict, even if the Strait of Hormuz remained largely closed. All three benchmark indexes ended in the green.

How Did the Benchmarks Perform?

The Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJI) rose 2.5%, or 1125.37 points, to close at 46,341.51. Twenty-five components of the 30-stock index ended in positive territory, while five ended in negative.

The tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite added 795.99 points, or 3.8%, to close at 21,590.63.

The S&P 500 gained 184.8 points, or 2.9%, to close at 6,528.52. Nine of the 11 broad sectors of the benchmark index closed in the green. The Communication Services Select Sector SPDR (XLC), the Technology Select Sector SPDR (XLK) and the Consumer Discretionary Select Sector SPDR (XLY) advanced 4.4%, 4.2%, 3.3% respectively, while the Energy Select Sector SPDR (XLE) declined 1.1%.

The fear gauge CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) decreased 17.5% to 25.25. A total of 22.4 billion shares were traded on Tuesday, higher than the last 20-session average of 20.3 billion. Advancers outnumbered decliners by a 5.2-to-1 ratio on the S&P 500. The S&P 500, Nasdaq and the Dow Jones posted their largest single-day gains since May 2025.

Wall Street Rallies on Hopes of Middle East De-escalation

Wall Street closed sharply higher on Tuesday as optimism grew over a possible de-escalation in the Middle East conflict, which had recently driven oil prices higher and stoked global inflation fears. Sentiment improved after a The Wall Street Journal report said Donald Trump was open to ending the military campaign against Iran, even if the Strait of Hormuz stays largely closed.

All three major U.S. indexes rallied strongly, with the S&P 500, Nasdaq Composite and Dow Jones Industrial Average marking their biggest single-day gains in months. Technology and consumer discretionary stocks outperformed, supported by easing concerns over inflation and interest rates. Lower bond yields boosted demand for growth stocks, while hopes of stable energy prices improved the outlook for consumer spending, lifting discretionary shares.

Chip Stocks Surge in Strong Recovery Session

The PHLX Semiconductor Sector Index (SOX) surged 6.24%, its strongest session in nearly a year, rebounding after a sharp decline in the previous session as investors returned to chip stocks amid improving market sentiment.

Consequently, shares of NVIDIA Corporation NVDA and NXP Semiconductors N.V. NXPI added 5.9% and 5.1%, respectively. While NVDA sports a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy), NXPI has a #3 (Hold). You can see the complete list of today's Zacks #1 Rank stocks here.

Story Continues

Monthly Roundup

Wall Street closed the month of March sharply lower. The Dow Jones Industrial Average was down 5.4%, the S&P 500 fell 5.1%, and the Nasdaq Composite lost 4.8%, their worst month since late 2022. Losses were due to Iran conflict-led oil spikes and inflation fears, with a late-month rally failing to offset declines.

Quarterly Roundup

In the quarter ended March 31, 2026, the Nasdaq Composite fell 7.1%, the S&P 500 dropped 4.6% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average declined 3.6%, pressured by Middle East tensions, elevated oil prices, persistent inflation, rising bond yields and uncertainty over Fed policy.

Economic Data

Per S&P Global data, Case Shiller Home Prices for 10-City Composites remained flat for January. The 20-City Composite decreased 0.1%.

Per the Conference Board, U.S. Consumer Confidence for March rose to 91.8 against a consensus of 87.5. The number for February remained unrevised at 91.2.

news.Title: Here's Why You Should Retain ADP Stock in Your Portfolio Now
news.Content:
Automatic Data Processing, Inc. ADP stock dipped over the past year. Shares of the company have declined 32.1% compared with a 13.1% dip of the industry it belongs to and the 17.4% rally of the Zacks S&P 500 composite.

1-Year Share Price Performance

Image Source: Zacks Investment Research

The Zacks Consensus Estimate for fiscal 2026 revenues is expected to improve 6.1% year over year, and the same for fiscal 2027 is anticipated to gain 5.5%. The consensus mark for EPS is anticipated to increase 9.5% in fiscal 2026 and 10% in fiscal 2027.

Factors That Augur Well for ADP

ADP capitalizes on the three-tier business strategy to maintain and grow its strong position as a human capital management (HCM) technology and services provider. The company delivers a complete suite of cloud-based HCM and HR Outsourcing solutions. It is expanding its international HCM and HRO businesses with established local, in-country software solutions and cloud-based multi-country solutions.

The company accelerates DataCloud penetration and boosts investment in inside sales, mid-market migrations and service alignment initiatives via transformation initiatives. These initiatives allow the company to continue to innovate, improve operations, expand margins and enhance its ability to innovate.

ADP has a consistent record of making dividend payments. In fiscal 2025, 2024, 2023, 2022 and 2021, the company paid out $2.4 billion, $2.2 billion, $1.9 billion, $1.7 billion and $1.6 billion in dividends, respectively. Such moves indicate the company’s commitment to returning value to shareholders and underscore its confidence in its business. We are expecting steady income growth, which will translate to steady cash flow, enabling ADP to pay out stable dividends.

ADP's current ratio (a measure of liquidity) at the end of the second-quarter fiscal 2026 was 1.03, lower than the industry average of 2.09. However, a current ratio of more than 1 often indicates that the company will be able to easily pay off its short-term obligations.

Risks Faced by Automatic Data Processing

ADP faces significant competition in each of its product lines. Both its Employer Services and PEO Services segments compete with other independent business outsourcing companies in most of their operating regions. The company has observed a few negative impacts on its retention rate, owing to the rising competition and migration from the legacy business.

The outsourcing industry is labor-intensive and heavily dependent on foreign talent. Surging talent costs due to rising competition could deteriorate the industry’s growth, affecting ADP as an eminent industry player.

Story Continues

ADP’s Zacks Rank & Stocks to Consider

Automatic Data Processing carries a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) at present.

Some better-ranked stocks from the broader Zacks Computer and Technology sector are Cisco Systems CSCO and Dell Technologies DELL.

Cisco Systems carries a Zacks Rank of 2 (Buy) at present. It has a long-term (next five years) earnings growth expectation of 7.8%. You can see the complete list of today’s Zacks #1 Rank (Strong Buy) stocks here.

CSCO delivered a trailing four-quarter earnings surprise of 2.9%, on average.

Dell Technologies has a Zacks Rank of 2 at present. It has a long-term earnings growth expectation of 20.7%.

DELL delivered a trailing four-quarter earnings surprise of 1.2%, on average.

news.Title: 台股回神彈逾千點！台新00987A單日飆漲7.73% 勇奪主被動ETF績效王
news.Content: 美國總統川普透露，美軍預計在 2 至 3 周內撤離伊朗，市場預期戰事即將結束，美股四大指數全面大漲，其中，費半暴漲 6.24%，激勵台股漲幅收盤大漲 1451 點，重返 33000 點大關之上，也帶動台股 ETF 飆翻天，觀察今 (1) 日收盤績效前十強皆大漲 5% 以上，其中，主動台新優勢成長 (00987A-TW) 是唯一漲逾 7%，高居主被動 ETF 績效王。 根據台新投信官網最新顯示，00987A 前十大成分股為台積電、奇鋐、旺矽、台燿、貿聯、台達電、群聯、健策、台光電、智邦，皆是今年來的強勢股，本日更是帶動大盤勁揚的領頭羊，也推升 00987A 3 月及今年來皆創下亮眼的績效表現。 00987A 經理人魏永祥表示，雖然股市短線面臨美伊戰爭衝擊而大幅震盪，但就歷史經驗來看，戰爭對股市影響多為短期，在台股漲多技術性修正以及融資減肥後，將反映企業基本面回到常軌上。 就總經面分析，在科技景氣重心從消費性電子轉向 AI 資本支出，形成「結構性超級循環」，分析師預估台灣 AI 相關供應鏈 2026 年在高基期下仍保持 20~60% 的盈餘高成長，紮實的基本面提供台股多頭續航的火種，操作上，首選台股主動式 ETF，運用經理人主動選股策略，掌握一籃子強勢股漲升行情。 4/1 績效前十前之主被動台股 ETF 2026/4/1 收盤價 (元) 漲幅 (%) 3 月以來漲幅 00987A 主動台新優勢成長 主動式國內股票型 12.4 7.73 5.08 00991A 主動復華未來 50

news.Title: 1 Beaten-Down AI Stock to Buy and 1 to Avoid

news.Title: Who Is Tesla's Top Competitor?
news.Content: He may not have invented the all-electric, battery-powered vehicle. But, there's certainly no denying that Tesla 's (NASDAQ: TSLA) founder, Elon Musk, ushered them out of the fringe of the automobile business and into the mainstream. By making them look stylish, the eccentric Musk arguably made the industry viable, in turn making Tesla the $1.4 trillion behemoth that it is today. As could have been expected, though, once profits finally started flowing for Tesla, competitors' interest in this business dramatically ramped up. Although not every newcomer to the industry is thriving, enough of them are doing well enough to force ...
news.AI_Summary:
• BYD is emerging as Tesla's top competitor in the EV market, selling more EVs globally than Tesla in the past year.
• BYD sold over 2.25 million EVs compared to Tesla's 1.63 million, and is also gaining market share in Europe.
• Tesla faces competition from BYD in China, where the EV industry has exploded without Tesla's significant growth.
• BYD is experiencing a price war, reporting a 19% year-over-year decline in profits despite revenue growth.
news.Keywords: EV market, automotive competition, market share, China, Europe, profit decline

news.Title: 台股噴漲外資買超232億元 加碼金控及台塑四寶 回補台積電、鴻海
news.Content:
美國總統川普喊出「不必與伊朗達成協議，美國也能結束戰爭」，激勵台股今 (1) 日強勢反彈，終場大漲 1451.83 點或 4.58%，創台股第二大漲點，以 33174.82 點作收，成交量 6161.23 億元。外資 3 月上演大逃殺後，今天回頭買超 232.51 億元，並敲進鴻海逾 1 萬張，且偏愛金融股，買超台新新光金逾 4 萬張，對於連賣四天的台積電，也反手回補 6182 張。

觀察三大法人今天籌碼動向，外資在 3 月上演大逃殺後，今天回頭買超 232.51 億元，投信與自營商也同步加碼，投信買超 101.11 億元，自營商買超 216.2 億元，三大法人合計買超 549.82 億元。

外資今天青睞金融族群，買超台新新光金最多，達 4.2 萬張，中信金 1 萬張，合庫金 7968 張，兆豐金 7451 張，第一金 7058 張。另外，同步加碼友達 3.3 萬張，中鋼 1.8 萬張，南亞 1.6 萬張，鴻海 1 萬張，台化 9229 張，台塑 8452 張。

外資今天也大舉敲進 2 檔主動 ETF，買超 00981A 主動統一台股增長 6.6 萬張，00991A 主動復華未來 50 3 萬張。

外資今天賣超華邦電 3 萬張，力積電 2.6 萬張，群創 1.3 萬張，聯電 1.1 萬張，正文 1.1 萬張，定穎投控 9350 張，華通 7883 張，大聯大 4803 張，菱生 4647 張，敬鵬 4359 張。

投信買超方面，今天同樣偏愛金融族群，加碼中信金 4600 張，國泰金 3977 張，元大金 3740 張，富邦金 1948 張。此外，也買超大聯大 6070 張，華通 4772 張，南亞 3021 張，台塑化 2263 張，聯強 1651 張，遠傳 1481 張。

投信賣超部分，今天減碼華邦電 6638 張，聯電 4122 張，中華電 3033 張，其他如南亞科、景碩、定穎投控、華航、文曄、京元電子以及健鼎都是投信減碼對象。

news.Title: Down 37%, This Cloud Stock Is Starting to Look Like a Screaming Buy
news.Content: Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) has hit significant challenges over the past six months, as many investors increasingly fear that competition will erode its market share. The company's stock is down by 37% over this period, as of this writing. However, after its massive correction, Veeva Systems' ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Veeva Systems (VEEV) specializes in cloud solutions for life sciences companies, holding a leadership position in its niche.
• The company has a strong economic moat due to high switching costs among its clients.
• Veeva Systems is investing in AI, launching Veeva AI to automate tasks like clinical data review and regulatory compliance.
• The company estimates a total addressable market of over $20 billion, significantly larger than its current trailing-12-month revenue of $3.2 billion.
news.Keywords: cloud solutions, life sciences, AI tools, market expansion, economic moat

news.Title: Tesla Q1 deliveries likely to dip sequentially as EV demand softens
news.Content: April 1 (Reuters) - Tesla 's first-quarter deliveries are expected to be lower than in the December ‌quarter as the electric-vehicle maker struggles with ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's first-quarter deliveries are expected to be lower sequentially due to uneven demand and intensifying competition in key markets.
• Analysts expect Tesla to deliver approximately 368,900 vehicles in Q1, an 11.8% sequential decline but 9.6% growth year-over-year.
• Intensifying competition in Europe and China, along with the expiry of U.S. federal tax credits, are weighing on demand.
• Tesla is diversifying beyond EVs, focusing on solar energy, humanoid robots, and autonomous robotaxis.
news.Keywords: EV deliveries, demand softening, competition, market challenges, business diversification

news.Title: AI Infrastructure Spending Could Nearly Triple by 2029. Here Are 2 Stocks to Buy.
news.Content: Big tech is still pouring billions into the data centers powering artificial intelligence (AI) -- and the spending wave doesn't appear to be peaking anytime soon. Statista projects AI infrastructure investment will climb to $902 billion by 2029, up from $334 billion in 2025. Even after strong runs, some of the market's biggest AI winners, including Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Iren (NASDAQ: IREN) , are priced in a way that ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AI infrastructure investment is projected to reach $902 billion by 2029, up from $334 billion in 2025.
• Nvidia's data center business, accounting for over 90% of its revenue, grew 75% year-over-year, with strong demand for its GPUs.
• Nvidia expects $1 trillion in cumulative purchase orders for Blackwell and Rubin chips through 2027.
• Iren, a data center builder, has secured over 4.5 gigawatts of power and has a $9.7 billion contract with Microsoft.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, data center spending, GPU demand, revenue growth, power capacity

news.Title: 台積電大漲95元史上之最! 指數收漲1451點登第2大漲點
news.Content: 財經中心／綜合報導 受美伊兩國釋出緩戰訊號，台股今天（1）上演絕地大反攻，大漲超過1400點，收復季線，站回3萬3點大關，寫下史上第二大漲點，其中護國神山台積電罕見大漲95元，光是它就扛起大盤一半漲幅，同時受惠輝達投資邁威爾20億美元，也帶動矽光子族群大反彈。 台股一片紅通通，股價衝衝衝！權王台積電週三強勢反彈，罕見大漲95元，收在1855元，貢獻大盤超過760點，其他權值股，除聯發科翻黑下跌，台達電、鴻海、廣達全數走揚，日月光控投，更是攻上漲停版。 台股開高走高，一舉收復季線，站回3萬3千點大關，成交量6161億，三大法人買超549億元，總計1643家公司上漲。 統一期貨協理 廖恩平：「那我們可以看到，其實在昨天夜盤的時候，外資一口氣，回補了超過5千口以上的一個空單水位，所以整個一個避險情緒，是有一個大幅降溫，這樣的一個狀況，後續的觀盤重點，我想還是持續再去關注，在消息面的一個部分，那短線上來說的話，我認為多方氣勢，是有機會延續的，還沒有去做一個，手上持股，出脫的動作的話，這邊可以先續抱，去做一下觀望」。 台積電大漲95元史上之最! 指數收漲1451點登第2大漲點。（圖／民視財經網） 除了大型權值股，記憶體族群的旺宏、群聯、威剛強勢漲停，ABF載板和PCB族群也表現亮眼，欣興、南電、金像電通通漲停鎖死。加上輝達宣布投資邁威爾20億美元，激勵矽光子族群，聯亞、波若威、華星光攻上漲停，面板族群的友達也是受惠CPO題材亮起紅燈。 統一期貨協理 廖恩平：「那主要是因為在整個AI算力需求，激增的狀況之下，過去同線傳輸的一些缺點，被無限的一個放大，所以變成在矽光子族群，相關的技術，跟各方面的話需求出現了，非常快速的上升，預估到2030年這個滲透率，在AI的計算中心的部分，有機會來到35%以上」。 中東戰事牽動全球股市，隨著川普即將召開演說，投資市場密切關注，就怕一有風吹草動，影響自己的資產水位。 《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

news.Title: Apple at 50: From Apple I to the iPhone to AI and beyond
news.Content: April 1 marks 50 years since Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne (who quickly left the company) founded Apple ( AAPL ), then called Apple Computers. The company that exists today is a far cry from its humble beginnings in the Jobs’ family garage, where a small team of technology buffs formed one of the most important businesses in modern history. More from Yahoo Scout What challenges does Apple face with AI development? How has Apple transformed itself over 50 years? What made Apple successful in its early years? How important are Services to Apple's current revenue? Initially formed ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple (AAPL) is celebrating its 50th anniversary, but faces concerns about falling behind competitors in the AI race.
• The company's AI-enhanced Siri is behind schedule, and it has lost AI experts to rival firms.
• Apple's ability to repeatedly transform itself has been key to its perseverance, but it needs to adapt to AI.
• The company's services division is a significant revenue driver, but AI integration is crucial for future growth.
news.Keywords: company anniversary, AI development, competitive lag, services revenue, future growth

news.Title: 5 Simple ETFs to Buy With $1,000 and Hold for a Lifetime
news.Content: Are you looking for a simple "set it and forget it" portfolio? It's fine if you are. A simpler and more passive investing approach often ends up performing better than a more aggressive and actively traded portfolio anyway. And exchange-traded funds (or ETFs) are arguably the smartest, easiest way to establish positions you can comfortably hold for a lifetime. With that as the backdrop, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article suggests building a diversified ETF portfolio for long-term holding, including Vanguard S&P 500 ETF (VOO) and iShares Russell 2000 ETF (IWM).
• It recommends iShares Core MSCI Total International Stock ETF (IXUS) and Vanguard FTSE Emerging Markets ETF (VWO) for international exposure.
• The portfolio is rounded out with iShares Core U.S. Aggregate Bond ETF (AGG) for income and stability.
• The article mentions AI favoring manufacturing economies and potentially undermining service-focused economies like the U.S.
news.Keywords: ETF portfolio, diversification, long-term investing, international exposure, AI impact

news.Title: 中東局勢露曙光台股強漲千點　新台幣連2升收31.949元
news.Content:
（中央社記者趙敏雅台北2026年04月1日電）市場期待中東戰事接近尾聲，台股今天激情上漲逾千點，創收盤史上第2大漲點，新台幣同步走揚，早盤一度勁揚1角，但午後升幅收斂，收盤收在31.949元，升3.1分，匯價連2升，台北及元太外匯市場總成交金額為23.31億美元。

美國總統川普表示，預計將在2至3週內結束對伊朗的軍事行動，伊朗也釋出有意解決衝突的訊號，提振投資人信心，帶動美股反彈。台股今天開高走高，終場收33174.82點，飆漲1451.83點，創收盤第2大漲點。

由於避險情緒降溫，三大法人今天聯手買超台股549.81億元，外資終結連4賣，買超232.51億元。

新台幣兌美元今天以31.94元開盤後，早盤一度升抵31.88元，不過，午盤後升幅收斂，最低觸及31.976元。

外匯交易員表示，台股受消息面激勵大漲，外資反手回補，早盤匯入力道較大，使新台幣走勢較強，但午後外資在匯市轉為雙向操作，抑制新台幣升幅。此外，央行有別於前幾個交易日積極調節，今天放手讓新台幣反映市場供需。

外匯交易員指出，今天股匯市成交量均不大，市場在觀望中東局勢緩和是否僅為一時消息，後續關注川普就伊朗戰事發表全國演說。

根據央行統計，美元指數今天重挫0.82%，主要亞幣齊走升，韓元狂飆1.51%、日圓強彈0.54%、人民幣與新加坡幣均升0.43%，新台幣升值0.1%。

news.Title: Morning Brief: Stocks roar back, plus our giant, action-packed Q1 roundup
news.Content: 👋 Good morning! And happy April. Congrats on making it through quite the quarter, everyone. We'll say this up front: The Morning Brief does not do April Fool's Day. Tuesday was an absolute blockbuster day in the markets, as stocks surged on optimism about an off-ramp from the Iran conflict. The S&P 500 ( ^GSPC ) gained 2.9%, the Dow ( ^DJI ) 2.5%, and the Nasdaq ( ^IXIC ) 3.8%. Once again, these are not typos or April foolishness. And our Jared Blikre reminds us that this does not dig us out of March's hole. The S&P 500 is ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Stocks surged on Tuesday due to optimism about an off-ramp from the Iran conflict, with the S&P 500 gaining 2.9%.
• Iranian President Pezeshkian signaled openness to negotiation, leading to a drop in crude oil prices, though they remain above $100 per barrel.
• Labor market data, including ADP private payroll numbers, and retail sales are key economic indicators to watch.
• Super Micro is described as 'uninvestable' due to a series of 'own-goals', while CoreWeave secured an $8.5 billion GPU-backed loan.
news.Keywords: market rally, Iran conflict, economic data, AI stocks, financing

news.Content: 👋 Good morning! And happy April. Congrats on making it through quite the quarter, everyone. We'll say this up front: The Morning Brief does not do April Fool's Day. Tuesday was an absolute blockbuster day in the markets, as stocks surged on optimism about an off-ramp from the Iran conflict. The S&P 500 ( ^GSPC ) gained 2.9%, the Dow ( ^DJI ) 2.5%, and the Nasdaq ( ^IXIC ) 3.8%. Once again, these are not typos or April foolishness. And our Jared Blikre reminds us that this does not dig us out of March's hole. The S&P 500 is ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Stocks surged on Tuesday due to optimism about an off-ramp from the Iran conflict, with the S&P 500 gaining 2.9%.
• Iranian President Pezeshkian signaled openness to negotiation, leading to a drop in crude oil prices, though they remain above $100 per barrel.
• Labor market data, including ADP private payroll numbers, and retail sales are key economic indicators to watch.
• Super Micro is described as 'uninvestable' due to a series of 'own-goals', while CoreWeave secured an $8.5 billion GPU-backed loan.
news.Keywords: market rally, Iran conflict, economic data, AI stocks, financing

news.Title: 外資買超台股232億元終結連4賣　加碼台積電、鴻海
news.Content:
（中央社記者鍾榮峰台北2026年4月1日電）美國和伊朗政府釋出終結衝突訊號，美股飆漲，台股今天跌深強彈，盤中最高33182.22點，大漲1459.23點，創歷史盤中第3大漲點，終場飆漲1451.83點，創歷史收盤第2大漲點，外資買超台股新台幣232.51億元，終結連4賣，其中加碼鴻海與台積電，終結連4賣。

終場加權指數33174.82點，成交值約新台幣6346.93億元，是今年1月12日以來低量，三大法人今天同步買超合計549.81億元，其中自營商買超216.19億元，投信買超101.11億元，外資及陸資買超232.51億元，外資終結連4賣，投信連3買。

根據統計，台股今天飆漲1451點，上市公司總市值增加4.71兆元至108.25兆元，台積電今天成交值703.63億元，占上市公司成交值比重約11%。

在台指期淨部位，三大法人今天淨多單增加2931口至3992口，其中外資淨空單減少5841口至3萬1373口。

觀察外資買賣超個股動向，根據台灣證券交易所統計，外資買超逾萬張的前9大股票包括主動統一台股增長ETF、台新新光金、友達、主動復華未來50ETF、中鋼、南亞、復華富時不動產ETF、中信金、鴻海。

其中外資買超鴻海約1.04萬張，終結連4賣，外資今天也買超台積電6181張，終結連4賣。

外資今天賣超逾萬張的股票包括華邦電、力積電、群創、聯電、以及正文。

兆豐國際投顧副總經理黃國偉指出，台股和亞洲股市同步飆漲，反映美伊雙方表態和緩、市場高度期待中東緊繃戰勢結束，不過荷莫茲海峽（Strait ofHormuz）可否正常通行將是短期觀察重點，牽動國際油價是否繼續維持高檔。

黃國偉表示，市場關注荷莫茲海峽能否在5月前正常通行，若拖延至下半年徒增變數，通膨壓力恐影響經濟和企業獲利展望，以及美國聯邦準備理事會（Fed）利率決策動向，增加股市不確定性，美國、以色列、伊朗等多方態度，值得觀察。

news.Title: Does Google's New TurboQuant Technology Mean the Party's Over for Micron?
news.Content: A little over a year ago, A Chinese quantitative hedge fund-turned-AI lab released an advanced AI model called DeepSeek . While there is some debate about exactly how cheaply and on what chips DeepSeek was trained, there is no doubt that DeepSeek implemented novel innovations that greatly boosted the efficiency of training an AI model with fewer and "less good" semiconductors. AI semiconductor and memory stocks sold off sharply on the news, based on the surface-level impression that AI companies wouldn't need to buy so many logic and memory chips. However, we all now know that ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Google's TurboQuant technology, a software-based AI memory compression, could reduce DRAM demand for AI inference.
• This could shift market share from GPUs with High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM) to CPUs using traditional server memory like DDR5.
• TurboQuant claims to increase KV cache capacity six times and speed up AI inference eight times without accuracy loss.
• Memory companies like Micron (MU) and its suppliers saw sharp sell-offs on the news.
news.Keywords: AI memory, compression technology, DRAM demand, HBM, market shift

news.Title: 中東戰事有望結束？台股飆逾千點、新台幣收連二紅
news.Content:
市場預期中東局勢有望降溫，激勵美股強勢反攻，加上美元指數走弱，台股大盤1日終場狂飆逾千點，新台幣兌美元匯率同步上漲，盤中一度回升至31.8元價位，但相較於股市強勁表現，匯市反應相對冷淡，後續觀察美國總統川普2日談話，戰爭若有明確結束時間點，市場將做出反應，股匯有望同步續揚。

近期中東戰火影響，股匯連日震盪，但美方釋放可能停火的消息，台股大漲1,451點作收，帶動新台幣早盤開高走高，最高升值近1角至31.815元，終場收在31.949元、升3.1分，連二個交易日走揚，總成交量23.31億美元。

匯銀主管指出，台股受市場消息面激勵，外資回頭繼續買超232.51億元，早盤資金匯入帶動新台幣上漲，一度逼近31.7元價位，但盤中來到相對高價，進口商趁機進場撿便宜買匯，加上外資仍有買有賣，雙向操作下，導致匯價升幅逐步拉回，午盤後交投轉冷，僅剩實質拋補為主，一路在31.95元上下震盪至收盤。

匯銀主管表示，川普將在台北時間周四9時，就伊朗戰事發表談話，市場與其戰爭有望2～3周內結束，停戰出現曙光後，激勵市場風險偏好，整體亞股同步反彈，股市大漲帶動資金匯入，新台幣波動看似偏平淡，但其實盤中也反應走揚近1角，主要是當前價格買方也能接受，買賣力道同步進場拉扯。

盤中買賣均衡，央行也暫時放手。匯銀主管認為，主要幣別同步上漲，央行有別於前幾個交易日積極調節，1日明顯先放手讓新台幣反應市場走向，但戰爭影響物價仍待觀察，央行穩住市場信心仍是首要目標，儘管沒有所謂防線，但短線應會守在32元下方。

隨美元指數下挫，1日主要亞幣同步升值，前波跌幅最深的韓元大漲1.51％最強，其次為日圓大漲0.54％、人民幣及星幣各漲0.43％、新台幣僅升0.1％相對平穩。

news.Title: 《陸股》滬指重回3900點、漲1.46%；恆指漲2.04%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-01 17:30:14 新聞中心 發佈

中國滬深兩市三大指數今(1)日集體開高，市場集體反彈，滬指重返3900點大關，三大指數均漲逾1%，科創50指數漲逾3%。盤面上，半導體、算力硬體題材反彈，記憶體、CPO方向領漲，黃金、AI算力、工業金屬、商業航太、消費電子等概念股活躍；相較下，油氣、煤炭板塊回檔。整體來看，兩市個股呈普漲態勢，上漲個股近4,500檔，滬指終場收漲1.46%，日K翻紅。

上證指數今收於3948.55點，上漲56.69點或1.46%；深證成指收於13706.52點，上漲228.46點或1.70%；創業板指收於3247.52點，上漲62.57點或1.96%；科創50收於1298.20點，上漲41.87點或3.33%；中證A500收於5626.33點，上漲99.60點或1.80%。

成交量方面，滬市今成交8,973億元(人民幣,下同)，深市成交1兆1,152億元，兩市成交額2兆125億元，較前一交易日量增約1%，兩市成交額重回2兆元。

從盤面上來看，醫療服務、細胞免疫治療、重組蛋白板塊漲幅居前；軌交設備、兵裝重組概念、油氣開採及服務板塊下跌。

港股方面，受美伊局勢緩和消息影響，風險市場回暖，香港恆生指數今日開盤上漲2.30%，恆指重返25000點大關。盤面上，恆生科技指數漲2.29%，大型科技股、大金融股等權重助力大市回升，其中百度漲逾3.6%，阿里巴巴漲逾3.1%。恆指收於25294.03點，上漲505.89點或2.04%，惟日K連二黑。

《陸股》滬指失守3900點、跌1.09%；恆指失守25000點

《陸股》滬指漲1.78%、日K翻紅；恆指重回25000點

news.Title: Bull of the Day: Lumentum (LITE)
news.Content: I last wrote about Lumentum ( LITE ) as the Bull of the Day on February 11 after the company delivered a very strong beat-and-raise quarter and shares launched to new highs near $600. Since then, LITE as etched more new highs near $800. There have also been many exciting industry developments that suggest estimates for this maker of optical systems for NVIDIA ( NVDA ) datacenter networking will keep going higher. news.Title: Chinese chipmakers claim nearly half of local market as Nvidia's lead shrinks
news.Content: (Corrects to clarify attribution) By Che Pan and Laurie Chen BEIJING, April 1 (Rtrs) - Chinese GPU and AI chip makers captured nearly 41% of China's ‌AI accelerator server market last year, eroding Nvidia 's ( NVDA ) once-dominant ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Chinese chipmakers captured nearly 41% of China's AI accelerator server market in 2025, eroding Nvidia's dominant position.
• U.S. export controls have pushed Chinese companies to adopt domestic alternatives, with Huawei leading among local vendors.
• Nvidia shipped around 2.2 million cards in China, holding a 55% market share, a retreat from its previous dominance.
• AMD holds a modest 4% share, while Chinese vendors collectively shipped 1.65 million cards.
news.Keywords: AI chips, China market, market share erosion, export controls, domestic alternatives

news.Title: Billionaire Ken Griffin Buys 2 AI Stocks Chasing a $1 Trillion Market Opportunity in Robotaxis (Hint: Not Tesla)
news.Content: Light-duty vehicles travel over 3 trillion miles annually in the U.S., per the Bureau of Transportation Statistics. Ride-sharing services typically charge $1 to $2 per mile. So, even if autonomous driving technology cuts the price in half, robotaxis still represent a trillion-dollar market in the U.S. alone. In the fourth quarter, hedge fund billionaire Ken Griffin bought shares of Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) , two stocks at the center of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia GPUs are the industry standard for AI workloads, and its software ecosystem streamlines development of physical AI applications.
• Nvidia's Omniverse simulation platform and Cosmos foundation models are key for developing robotaxis.
• Nvidia CFO Colette Kress estimates robotaxis could generate hundreds of billions in revenue over the next decade.
• Amazon's Zoox is testing robotaxis in Las Vegas and San Francisco, with plans to expand to Austin and Miami.
news.Keywords: AI workloads, robotaxi development, simulation platform, autonomous driving, market opportunity

news.Title: Microsoft Just Had Its Worst Quarter Since 2008--Is This a Generational "Buy" Signal?
news.Content: Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) entered 2026 riding high. The tech giant had delivered solid double-digit gains for three consecutive years, including a spectacular 57% return in 2023. Then, metaphorically speaking, the wheels fell off. The world's third-largest technology company by market cap finished the first quarter of 2026 with its share price down 24%. This marked the steepest quarterly decline for Microsoft since late ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft (MSFT) experienced its steepest quarterly decline since late 2008, down 24% in Q1 2026, due to increased capital expenditures for AI infrastructure.
• The company plans to boost capex to $146 billion in fiscal 2026, primarily for AI infrastructure expansion.
• Microsoft's remaining performance obligations (RPOs) soared 110% YoY to $625 million, indicating a strong backlog.
• Wall Street remains bullish, with 54 out of 57 analysts rating the stock as a 'buy' or 'strong buy'.
news.Keywords: capital expenditure, AI infrastructure, RPO, analyst sentiment, stock performance

news.Title: 台股噴漲1451點史上第二大！面板雙虎回神爆量狂衝｜Yahoo財經掃描
news.Content:
中東戰火出現緩和曙光，伊朗領導層首度對停戰談判釋出開放態度，科技七雄與半導體股同步強彈，帶動美股四大指數明顯回溫。道瓊工業指數上漲2.49%，那斯達克指數勁揚3.83%，標普500指數上漲2.91%，費城半導體指數更大漲6.24%。個股方面，輝達受惠投資邁威爾消息激勵走強，Meta、Alphabet、特斯拉與英特爾等科技巨頭也全面反彈，美光同步走高，台積電ADR則飆升6.78%。

亞股則跟進美股全面走揚，日股大漲5.24%，韓股也強升8.44%，港股走揚1.91%，上證指數也漲1.46%，顯示區域市場同步反映地緣風險降溫利多。

回到台股，加權指數今(1)日終場大漲1451.83點，收33,174.82點，成交金額6,173.71億元，寫下史上第二大漲點，整體盤面呈現全面性反彈；權王 台積電(2330) 大漲95元，成為推升指數最關鍵的主力。盤面強勢股方面，AI與電子權值股明顯回神， 鴻海(2317) 、 台達電(2308) 等同步反彈；面板族群在「光進銅退」題材帶動下買氣爆發，雙虎強勢表態；記憶體族群也重獲資金青睞。觀察盤面資金，除回補大型權值股外，也沿著面板、記憶體與ETF等高人氣題材同步擴散，不過量能仍未完全放大，反映追價意願仍待回溫。

📝盤點熱門股：群創、主動統一台股增長、友達

今日熱門成交股方面， 群創(3481) 以32.76萬張拿下成交量冠軍，股價走揚，主要受「光進銅退」題材帶動，市場資金湧入卡位，帶動買盤明顯升溫；同族群的 友達(2409) 也同步亮眼，股價走揚，反映面板雙虎在新題材發酵下成為盤面資金聚焦重心。

ETF方面， 主動統一台股增長(00981A) 交投熱絡，顯示主動式ETF買氣延續； 元大台灣50反1(00632R) 則是前五名中唯一走弱標的，反映指數強彈之際，反向ETF承壓、但市場避險與短線操作需求仍推升成交量居高不下。記憶體股則由 華邦電(2344) 擠進前五，股價走揚，主要受記憶體族群回神，加上成交額衝高帶動人氣續旺，顯示資金除追捧ETF與面板題材外，也同步回流電子次族群。

📌三大法人買賣超

三大法人今日合計買超549.81億元，資金明顯回流。其中外資買超232.51億元，回補力道居三大法人之首；自營商同步買超216.19億元，顯示在大盤強彈之際，法人操作明顯轉向偏多；投信也站在買方，單日買超101.11億元，延續穩定加碼態勢。整體來看，今天台股籌碼面由外資、自營商與投信全面偏多主導。

✨本日議題股：記憶體概念股

今日盤面聚焦記憶體族群回神，在美伊元首釋出「止戰」訊號、台股強彈逾千點帶動風險情緒回溫下，記憶體股明顯吸金，除 旺宏(2337) 、 宜鼎(5289) 盤中亮燈漲停外， 南亞科(2408) 與 華邦電(2344) 成交額也雙雙衝破130億元、擠進盤面成交額前五大，顯示資金除回補大型權值股外，也同步點火...... 點我看更多

👥油價漲誰苦誰笑：

中東戰火升溫擾亂原油、天然氣與石化原料供應，連帶引發塑料缺貨與成本上升疑慮；在此情境下，市場通常會先聯想到上游原料與報價具轉嫁能力的塑化族群較有機會受惠，但對仰賴塑膠原料、毛利率較薄或轉嫁能力較弱的下游加工與終端用料業者而言，成本壓力則可能明顯加重，形成...... 點我看更多

🔭重大財經事件展望

周四國際財經事件，先看美國市場，焦點落在3月就業報告、3月服務業與綜合PMI終值，另外還有上周初領失業救濟人數、3月Challenger裁員報告與2月進出口數據；歐洲方面，本日歐洲重要經濟數據相對有限，市場仍將持續關注主要經濟體景氣復甦與通膨走勢；亞太區方面，留意韓國公布3月CPI、澳洲公布月進出口數據，作為觀察區域通膨壓力與貿易表現的重要指標；港澳方面，尚無重大經濟數據公布。

台灣方面，企業動態以法說會與除息為主，法說會可留意 亞航(2630) 與 凱基金(2883) ；除息則可留意 譜瑞-KY(4966) 與 邁科(6831) 表現，另外群益科技高息成長、群益ESG投等債0-5與群益優選非投等債等ETF也將進行除權息，相關走勢可望成為盤面資金配置與高息商品熱度的觀察指標。

市場變化難捉摸？面對股市的大起大落，總會有看不懂、跟不上、難決策的時刻！ Yahoo財經掃描 每個台股交易日晚間6點上菜，整理市場最重要的財經熱點，從國際財經趨勢、產業焦點到個股異動，迅速掌握投資脈動，帶你快人一步，掌握市場先機。

註：加權指數成交金額含盤後定價，不含零股、鉅額、拍賣及標購

（核稿編輯：劉凱銘）

中東戰火升溫擾亂原油、天然氣與石化原料供應，連帶引發塑料缺貨與成本上升疑慮；在此情境下，市場通常會先聯想到上游原料與報價具轉嫁能力的塑化族群較有機會受惠，但對仰賴塑膠原料、毛利率較薄或轉嫁能力較弱的下游加工與終端用料業者而言，成本壓力則可能明顯加重，形成...... 點我看更多

🔭重大財經事件展望

周四國際財經事件，先看美國市場，焦點落在3月就業報告、3月服務業與綜合PMI終值，另外還有上周初領失業救濟人數、3月Challenger裁員報告與2月進出口數據；歐洲方面，本日歐洲重要經濟數據相對有限，市場仍將持續關注主要經濟體景氣復甦與通膨走勢；亞太區方面，留意韓國公布3月CPI、澳洲公布月進出口數據，作為觀察區域通膨壓力與貿易表現的重要指標；港澳方面，尚無重大經濟數據公布。

台灣方面，企業動態以法說會與除息為主，法說會可留意 亞航(2630) 與 凱基金(2883) ；除息則可留意 譜瑞-KY(4966) 與 邁科(6831) 表現，另外群益科技高息成長、群益ESG投等債0-5與群益優選非投等債等ETF也將進行除權息，相關走勢可望成為盤面資金配置與高息商品熱度的觀察指標。

市場變化難捉摸？面對股市的大起大落，總會有看不懂、跟不上、難決策的時刻！ Yahoo財經掃描 每個台股交易日晚間6點上菜，整理市場最重要的財經熱點，從國際財經趨勢、產業焦點到個股異動，迅速掌握投資脈動，帶你快人一步，掌握市場先機。

news.Title: Nvidia vs. Broadcom: The Smarter AI Stock to Buy in April
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Broadcom (NASDAQ: AVGO) are two of the top ways to invest in the artificial intelligence (AI) space. Many investors (like myself) may own both. However, there can only be one best buy for April. Let's take a look to see which stock has the advantage heading into April and what kind of upside is ahead. Will AI create ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's GPUs are the industry standard for AI computing, with its new Vera Rubin chip architecture expected to offer significant performance improvements.
• Nvidia expects $1 trillion in lifetime sales for Blackwell and Rubin chips by 2027, a substantial increase from previous projections.
• Broadcom designs custom AI chips for hyperscalers, expecting $100 billion in revenue from this segment by 2027.
• Nvidia's stock is considered cheaper from a forward P/E standpoint, and its growth rate was higher than Broadcom's last quarter.
news.Keywords: AI computing, GPU technology, custom AI chips, revenue projections, valuation

news.Title: Buy This Nasdaq Index Fund. History Says It Could Soar More Than 100% in 5 Years.
news.Content: The Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQINDEX: ^IXIC) is one of three major U.S. stock market indexes. It includes more than 3,000 companies listed on the Nasdaq Stock Exchange. The Nasdaq-100, which tracks a subset of those companies, recorded an average five-year return of 103% (including dividends) during the past two decades. Put differently, history says the Nasdaq-100 could roughly double investors' money over the next five years. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Nasdaq-100 index, tracked by Invesco QQQ Trust (QQQ), has historically provided strong returns, with an average five-year return of 103% over two decades.
• The Nasdaq-100 is heavily exposed to AI stocks, with top holdings including Nvidia, Apple, Alphabet, Microsoft, and Amazon.
• The index has a reasonable expense ratio of 0.18%, but concentration risk exists with the top 10 holdings comprising nearly 50% of its performance.
• The Nasdaq Composite is in a market correction territory, historically a good time to invest, with potential for even better five-year returns.
news.Keywords: Nasdaq-100, AI stocks, index fund, market correction, concentration risk

news.Title: 高息ETF中唯一持有台積電！00929暴力升息18% 年化配息率逾8%
news.Content:
不是愚人節玩笑！復華投信今 (1) 日於官網公告旗下熱門月配型 ETF — 復華台灣科技優息 (00929-TW) 最新配息資訊，4 月每受益權單位預計配發 0.13 元，相較於前一月的 0.11 元大幅調升 18.1%，並寫下一年半以來的新高紀錄。若以 1 日收盤價 19 元計算，00929 單次配息率約 0.68%，預估年化配息率高達 8.2%。

自 2025 年 4 月以來，00929 的配息金額展現穩定成長態勢，至今已累計 6 度調高配息。除了配得大方外，00929 的填息能力亦備受矚目，目前已寫下連續 17 個月當月填息的佳績，其中更有 16 個月是「當日填息」。

00929 已於 2025 年底進行指數規格升級，不僅維持科技優息特色，更成為目前 23 檔高股息 ETF 中唯一持有台積電。受惠於成份股調整與科技權值股走勢，00929 今年以來含息績效穩居高股息 ETF 前 5 名，單月績效更一度跑贏電子股報酬指數及大盤加權報酬指數。

00929 配息升至 0.13 元，若想參與本次配息，投資人須留意最後買進日為 2026 年 4 月 20 日，除息交易日落在 4 月 21 日，收益發放日則為 5 月 18 日。

根據 3 月 20 日至 3 月 27 日的集保中心最新統計顯示，00929 的投資人熱度不減，近一週持有 100 張以上的大戶人數增加 15 人，位居同類型 ETF 榜首，截至 3 月 27 日，總受益人數達 46 萬 5695 人。目前資產規模約 1064.64 億元。

news.Title: Better Stock to Buy Right Now: Costco vs. Amazon
news.Content: Both Costco (NASDAQ: COST) and Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) have delivered growth to investors over time. They each sell a wide variety of grocery and essential items as well as general merchandise -- though Costco is present in e-commerce, the lion's share of its business is through its warehouses. And though Amazon owns ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Costco (COST) offers value through bulk purchasing and membership fees, with shares trading at 48x forward earnings.
• Amazon (AMZN) focuses on value and offers a Prime membership, with its biggest profit driver being Amazon Web Services (AWS).
• AWS revenue has soared due to demand for AI products and services, and Amazon's valuation has declined to 25x forward earnings.
• Both stocks are considered excellent long-term additions, with Costco favored by cautious investors and Amazon for growth exposure in AI.
news.Keywords: retail, value investing, membership model, AWS, AI demand

news.Title: 《台股盤後》開高走高、收漲1451點，寫史上第2大漲點
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-01 16:15:03 新聞中心 發佈

美國與伊朗雙方釋出衝突降溫訊號，帶動美國四大指數週二全面強彈、尤其費半指數收漲逾6%，激勵台股今(1)日開高走高，由權王台積電領軍大漲，電子、金融及傳產股幾乎全面走揚、僅先前強勢的造紙股收黑，且20大權值股中日月光投控/台光電/智邦/欣興/鴻勁/致茂皆收漲停、近日弱勢的DRAM族群亦明顯反彈，輔以低價的友達、群創表現強勢，在在激勵市場信心，加權指數終場收在33174.82點，大漲1451.83點或4.58%、漲點為史上第二大，離月線關卡僅一步之遙、其餘均線則順利收復，惟成交量萎縮至6161.23億元。

伊朗領導層對停戰談判展現開放態度、為開戰以來頭一遭，再加上市場謠傳美國總統川普對幕僚透露就算未能重啟荷姆茲海峽、也想要提前終止戰爭，激勵美國四大指數週二全面衝高。亞洲股市方面，日經225指數半導體成份股如ADVANTEST等，跟進美國費半指數上日漲逾6%而呈強勢表現，相對激勵日股終場飆漲5.24%；韓國KOSPI指數受惠政策加持、半導體股強攻，收盤狂飆8.44%。

台積電跟進其ADR漲近7%走勢，開盤即重返1800元大關，終場收在最高點1855元、上漲5.40%，並帶動電子及半導體類股表現亮眼，鴻勁、智邦、致茂、日月光投控、世芯-KY亦齊飆漲停。同時在美光止跌反彈漲近5%帶動下，國內記憶體族群重獲資金點火，旺宏、群聯、威剛、宇瞻、宜鼎、廣穎皆鎖漲停，創見、十銓、品安、南亞科、華邦電同步走揚；另外載板三雄受惠AI及HPC需求強勁，欣興、南電雙雙攻上漲停，景碩也強漲逾6%。

以29大類股表現來看，今日只有先前強勢的造紙股收跌3.21%、其餘各族群均呈漲勢，並以電子零組件漲6.66%、其他電子漲5.44%、電子漲5.19%、半導體漲4.8%表覝最搶眼，主要係外資喊進日月光投控及京元電、內外資喊進台積電，以及NVIDIA砸20億美元入股MARVELL並助攻光通訊股走勢的題材激勵，加上費半指數上日強勢反彈、市場熱錢有重返科技股現象。

三大法人動向方面，今日三大法人合計買超549.82億元；其中，自營商買超216.20億元，投信買超101.11億元，外資及陸資買超232.51億元。

《台股盤後》重挫795點、失守季線；月K翻黑

《台股盤後》開低走低、收跌658點，失守月線

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: Is It Too Late to Buy Nvidia Stock?
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) has been one of the best-performing stocks in the market for the past five years, up 1,220% over that period. That has helped it grow to become the largest company in the world , with a market capitalization (market cap) of over $4.1 trillion. Nvidia's rise to the mountaintop is well deserved. The company has just seen explosive growth over the past several years. Its revenue has gone from ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) has grown revenue from $16.7 billion in fiscal 2021 to $215.9 billion last fiscal year, a nearly 13x increase.
• The company's growth is fueled by AI, with its GPUs and CUDA software platform establishing a wide moat.
• Nvidia's networking segment revenue surged 263% to $11 billion last quarter, transforming it into a data center platform company.
• Nvidia continues to evolve by developing LPUs and high-performance Vera CPUs to offer comprehensive AI data center solutions.
news.Keywords: revenue growth, AI, GPUs, CUDA, data center platform

news.Title: Americans Are Warming Up to Robotaxis -- and That's Big News for Alphabet and Tesla
news.Content: Would you feel anxious if a car with no driver showed up to take you to your destination? If so, you're not alone. A recent survey conducted by legal firm Murphy & Prachthauser found that 7 in 10 Americans would be at least somewhat apprehensive about riding in an autonomous rideshare vehicle. However, the numbers look much better with people who have actually ridden in a self-driving vehicle. Although ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Americans are warming up to robotaxis, with surveys showing increased comfort after experiencing autonomous rides.
• Alphabet's Waymo has logged over 20 million rides with a 93% customer satisfaction rate and a strong safety record.
• Tesla aims to scale its robotaxi services, leveraging its existing fleet equipped with FSD technology.
• Tesla's vision-only AI approach for autonomous driving could lower costs but may trade off safety compared to Waymo's LiDAR sensors.
news.Keywords: robotaxis, autonomous driving, customer satisfaction, market scaling, AI approach

news.Keywords: robotaxis, autonomous driving, customer satisfaction, market scaling, AI approach

news.Title: 晶圓代工產值今年上看2500億美元，二哥競爭激烈，陸資廠推進到先進製程
news.Content:
【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】2025年全球晶圓代工產業受惠於AI及供應鏈因應美國對等關稅的預防性備貨措施，產值已突破2,000億美元；展望2026年，DIGITIMES預估，在AI應用帶動下，全球晶圓代工產業規模將持續擴大，產業規模可望上看2,500億美元，廠商中，一哥台積電(2330)地位穩固，二哥方面，三星與英特爾競爭激烈，至於陸資企業端的競合，也將從成熟製程推進到先進製程。DIGITIMES分析，2026年全球晶圓代工產業成長動能，將更明顯集中於AI應用，並持續推升先進製程與先進封裝產能需求；另一方面，在記憶體等關鍵零組件輪漲下，將削弱智慧型手機、PC等消費性電子半導體需求，使成熟製程續承壓。

觀察2026年晶圓代工產業的競爭格局，DIGITIMES認為，台積電在技術及產能優勢下，競爭力護城河將持續深化，產業地位仍難撼動，不過，晶圓代工二哥之爭將更趨白熱化，三星電子(Samsung Electronics)與英特爾(Intel)分別在取得關鍵客戶訂單、AI推論產品線帶動通用型伺服器CPU需求下，展開競爭序幕。

值得關注的是，中系晶圓代工業者2026年將開出12萬片以上成熟製程產能，且在7奈米先進製程開發上，除中芯國際，華虹集團也加入戰局，DIGITIMES提醒，對中系晶圓代工業者的關注議題，將從成熟製程進一步擴展至先進製程的發展。

至於地緣風險，仍將是2026年晶圓代工產業景氣與競爭格局的一大變數，其中，美伊衝突除推升油價與運輸成本，也將進一步影響半導體供應鏈成本結構與產業景氣；此外，除戰事直接影響英特爾(Intel)、高塔半導體(Tower Semiconductor)等業者的晶圓廠營運，對半導體製程的關鍵原料供應也將因地緣風險增溫而受干擾。

news.Title: 記憶體飆漲 手機晶片開「砍單第1槍」！專家曝這2產品下一波受害
news.Content:
記憶體報價狂飆觸發全球消費電子警報。美系外資示警，受限於記憶體成本激增，2026年全球智慧型手機出貨量面臨顯著的下修壓力，整體消費需求將受到抑制。財經專家阮慕驊分析，中東戰火已對全球景氣產生負面衝擊，而且拖愈久影響愈大，手機晶片已出現「砍單潮」，下一波是否延燒至PC與NB（筆電）市場？

記憶體漲價壓力 手機需求轉弱

阮慕驊在臉書發文表示，記憶體價格大漲正直接衝擊消費端需求。美系外資觀察，中國大陸市場手機晶片庫存已率先修正，在成本墊高情況下，智慧型手機需求逐步受到壓抑，連帶影響上游供應鏈。

他指出，包括聯發科與高通已開始下修4奈米訂單，預估減少約2萬至3萬片晶圓，約相當於晶片出貨量減少1500萬至2000萬顆；此外，相關測試供應商如京元電也出現類似砍單情況。不過，由於AI與網通需求強勁，相關產能空缺已迅速被填補，對台積電影響有限。

PC與NB需求是否受波及 市場下一波關注焦點

外資同步下修今年全球手機出貨量，預估年減13%，其中Android陣營衰退幅度達15%，至於iPhone，則因新品發表時程調整，部分機型可能由今年秋季延後至明年春季推出，影響全年出貨表現。

阮慕驊指出，外資已將聯發科手機出貨預估下修至年減2成，並調降京元電第二季營收成長預期，由原先季增15%下修至10%。他示警，手機晶片砍單已經出現，後續是否擴及PC與筆電（NB）市場，值得密切關注。

他並強調，AI伺服器與雲端服務業者對記憶體價格上漲承受力較高，但消費端對價格敏感度明顯不同。在中東戰事與通膨壓力交織下，整體物價上漲趨勢已逐步擴散，市場不宜過度期待fed降息，「不升息」恐已是對股市最有利的情境。

news.Title: 亞股報復性反彈！創一年最猛漲幅 台積電、三星、SK海力士領軍衝鋒
news.Content:
由於市場樂觀預期伊朗戰爭可能在近期結束，亞股追隨美股漲勢，在周三 (1 日) 創下一年來最大單日漲幅。

MSCI 亞太指數在 4 月第一個交易日展開強力反彈、一度飆升 5.1%，創下去年 4 月 10 日以來最大漲幅。台日韓股市領漲，南韓 Kospi 指數一馬當先，終場大漲 8.4%，日股日經 225 指數飆升 2675 點或 5.2%，台灣加權指數也大漲 1451 點、相當於 4.58%。

科技權值股歸隊，台積電 (2330-TW) 終場上漲 5.4%，三星電子狂飆 13.4%，SK 海力士強彈 10.66%，三者同為激勵亞股的最大功臣。

韓聯社報導，南韓交易所 (KRX) 於開盤約七分鐘後，便啟動為期 5 分鐘的「買 / 賣暫停機制」(sidecar)，暫時停止 KOSPI 期貨的程式交易買單。通常在期貨指數波動達到 5% 以上時，就會在現貨市場觸發「買 / 賣暫停機制」，目的在緩和市場波動。

市場風險胃口好轉，主因是美國總統川普表示，美國將在「兩、三周內」結束與伊朗的戰爭，並暗示伊朗仍有可能在此期限內與美國達成協議。

白宮已宣布，川普預定美東周三晚間 9 點 (台灣周四上午 9 點) 發表有關伊朗戰爭的全國演說，各界高度關注美伊戰爭是否真如川普所言即將結束。

外媒同日還披露，伊朗總統裴澤斯基安 (Masoud Pezeshkian) 已經表示，德黑蘭擁有「必要的意志」結束與美國和以色列之間這場戰爭，同時尋求這場衝突不會重演的保障機制。

KCM Trade 首席市場分析師 Tim Waterer 說：「投資人看好衝突能在數周而非數月內解決，這讓市場今日進入買超模式。但由於油價仍維持在三位數高檔，且關於荷姆茲海峽命運的消息仍好壞參半，對市場而言，現在還稱不上是一帆風順。」

值得注意的是，即使 MSCI 亞太指數周三強力反彈，但與 2 月的高點相比仍下跌約 9%，顯示市場對於油價下跌的速度、以及川普保證的可信度，仍打上問號。

news.Title: 勞金局：台股3月跌逾10%　震盪中檢視低估部位
news.Content:
（中央社記者張雄風台北2026年04月1日電）勞動基金今年前2個月收益數為新台幣8131億元。勞金局表示，由於3月國際市場下殺嚴重，甚至讓1、2月的獲利回吐，雖然台股稍佳但仍下跌逾10%；會在市場震盪中檢視是否有被低估的部位。

勞動基金運用局今天公布整體勞動基金最新績效，今年截至2月底，整體勞動基金規模為8兆854億元，收益數為8131億元，收益率為10.83%，2月單月收益為4184億元。

根據統計，歷年單月勞動基金收益，本期為單月最高；其次為今年1月的3947億元、2025年10月3006億元。

勞動基金運用局副局長劉麗茹下午在記者會中表示，今年連續1、2月都刷新單月收益歷史新高，不過目前觀察3月份的金融市場，不論是金融市場、匯率或油價等，震盪非常劇烈。

劉麗茹指出，目前看3月金融指標，全世界的跌幅都很大，3月金融相關指標表現不佳，台股跌約10.42%，國際市場來看，是將今年1、2月收益「倒吐回去還不夠」；台股是目前全球市場中相對較好的。

由於中東戰爭，各界憂心油價波動會影響市場。劉麗茹解釋，勞動基金是屬於長期投資，不像短期進出入市場，因此是看整體產業的趨勢；以AI產業為例，在AI的趨勢下是同樣的方向，震盪會變成是一個機會，檢視是否有被低估的部位。

劉麗茹補充，油價問題引發的可能是通膨，也就是因為油價上漲侵蝕獲利，一樣的產品要花更多錢買，如果只是一陣子還好，比較需要擔心會不會變成長期的狀態；就目前看來應該只是短期震盪，會持續關注。

勞金局統計，勞動基金及國保基金近10年多（105年至今年2月）平均收益率分別為10.04%及10.33%，近5年多平均收益率分別為12.61%及12.68%，投資績效穩健。

news.Title: 台股滿血復活站回3萬3、投信狂掃101億 三大法人買超549.82億元
news.Content:
美伊和談露曙光，激勵台股今 (1) 日強勢反彈，記憶體、矽智財、PCB 及低軌衛星等族群全面噴漲，終場大漲 1451.83 點或 4.58%，創台股第二大漲點，以 33174.82 點作收，一舉站回 33000 點關卡，同步收復 5 日線與季線，成交量 6161.23 億元。 ；三大法人合計買超 549.82 億元。

news.Title: 【Follow法人】面板不同調！外資棄群創拱友達 主動式ETF00981A成寵兒掃貨6.6萬張
news.Content:
（下午5時16分更新外資買賣超個股）

台股今（1）日勁揚1451.83點，收在33174.82點。三大法人聯袂買超549.82億元，其中外資回補232.51億元，終結連續4賣，主要轉買超主動統一台股增長（00919）6.6萬張；記憶體股華邦電（2344）和力積電（6770）則逆勢遭調節。分析師表示，外資買超金額不算多，僅能稱為「踩剎車」，其仍在評估後續局勢的發展，尚未出現明確的長線回補訊號。

外資今日買超前三大：主動統一台股增長、台新新光金、友達

主動統一台股增長（00919）今年來表現搶眼，吸引資金大舉湧入，外資今終結連3賣，轉買超6萬6,509張居台股買超之冠；主動復華未來50（00991A）也有3萬904張買超。

外資主要買超鋼鐵塑化股，包括中鋼（2002）1萬8,820張、南亞（1303）1萬6,451張以及台化（1326）9,229張。

外資今日賣超前三大：華邦電、力積電、群創

憶體族群今日隨著美光止跌反彈，然而，外資逆勢砍華邦電（2344）3萬628張，以及力積電（6770）2萬6,479張。盤面亮眼的面板族群則是不同調，外資出脫群創（3481）1萬3,926張，買超友達（2409）3萬3,792張。

外資僅買233億元 分析師：「踩剎車」未翻多

根據證交所公布籌碼動向，三大法人今日合計買超549.82億元，其中外資買超232.51億元，終結連續4賣。外資前4個交易日共調節台股達1886.58億元。

投信續站買方，買超101.1萬元。自營商合計買超216.19億元，其中自行買賣部分買超67.6億元，避險方面買超148.58億元。

證期雙照分析師翁偉捷受訪表示，台股今日大漲逾千點，如此鉅大漲幅，外資照理應買超七、八百億元，但今日回補的量不算多，顯示其對台股的後續表現仍存有疑慮，僅能視為短期的「踩剎車」，而非全面看好回歸。

翁偉捷說明，外資持觀望態度的主要原因在於荷姆茲海峽封鎖時間的長短，對全球經濟持續產生影響。此外，根據美國總統川普最新的說法，戰爭可能還需至少兩至三周才能結束，這使得外資在作邏輯上，目前在全球資產部位仍傾向以賣超為主，對台股的買盤力道因此受限。

翁偉捷續指，外資今日動作偏向，在短期內尋找過去表現較強勢的個股進行局部布局，觀察是否有短期機會，並等待時機再進行後續的大規模回補。

王詩婷／財經特派記者，主跑勞動部、半導體、生技等

news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】受惠於台股大回神，雍智(6683)開高後，11點過後不 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受惠於台股大回神，雍智(6683)股價來到1505元漲停價位。
• 公司今年營運將顯著回升，營運續創新高無虞，題材面為先進測試相關介面。
• 聯發科(2454)為其今年重要大客戶，同時雍智也透過聯發科間接打入NVIDIA供應商，遂為盤面強勢股。
• 雍智今年可望自聯發科取得不少訂單，甚至間接成為NVIDIA的AI PC與Google TPU相關I/O供應鏈，今年營收可創新高，年增達三成。
news.Keywords: 個股表現,供應鏈,AI PC,NVIDIA,營運展望

news.Title: 台股強彈 台幣早盤爆量升值4.2分

美伊停戰露出曙光，今 ...

• 美元指數連二跌、早盤貶值約0.12%至99.843。
• 台股加權指數盤中勁揚逾1400點。

news.Title: 〈焦點股〉台股噴漲萬紅叢中一抹綠  造紙類股獨跌 華紙4根漲停後跌停
news.Content: 台股今 (1) 日盤中大漲逾 1400 點，不過近日漲多的造紙類股卻回檔修正獨跌，華紙 (19 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股今 (1) 日盤中大漲逾 1400 點，但近日漲多的造紙類股卻回檔修正獨跌。
• 華紙 (1905-TW) 連拉 4 根漲停後，今天跌停，其他包括永豐餘 (1907-TW)、正隆 (1904-TW) 及榮成 (1909-TW) 也都走跌。
• 造紙類股 3 月以來大漲 8.26%，在台股 3 月大跌逾 10% 的跌勢中，類股表現最為突出。
• 華紙指出，短纖價格持續走揚，4 月調漲包括文化用紙、包裝用紙等所有紙種，每公噸調漲 1500 至 2000 元。
news.Keywords: 類股輪動,造紙業,漲價題材,修正,修正

news.Title: 2 No-Brainer Software Stocks to Buy Right Now
news.Content: The arrival of artificial intelligence (AI) propelled many technology stocks skyward, but that changed in 2026. Wall Street realized AI could make some software businesses obsolete, leading to a sell-off that contributed to the tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite officially falling into correction territory . Still, the situation creates opportunities for the industrious investor to scoop up shares ...
news.AI_Summary:
• ServiceNow reported strong Q4 2025 sales growth of 21% year-over-year to $3.6 billion, with subscription sales representing stable recurring revenue.
• ServiceNow expects Q1 2026 subscription sales to rise 22% year-over-year to around $3.7 billion.
• Salesforce posted record revenue of $11.2 billion for its fiscal Q4 2026, with its Agentforce AI solutions showing strong adoption.
• Salesforce's Agentforce Q4 annual recurring revenue rose 169% year-over-year to $800 million.
• Both ServiceNow and Salesforce stocks have experienced significant price drops in 2026, presenting potential buying opportunities.
news.Keywords: AI, software platform, recurring revenue, valuation, growth stock

news.Title: 台股主動投資新利器　統一升級50主動式ETF即將開募
news.Content:
財經中心／綜合報導

在台股高檔震盪、個股表現分歧加劇的市場環境下，投資難度明顯升高。單純跟隨 台股加權指數 的被動投資策略，已難以滿足 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 在台股高檔震盪、個股表現分歧加劇的市場環境下，統一投信即將推出「統一台股升級50主動式ETF（00403A）」。
• 該ETF結合市值投資與主動選股策略，鎖定台股大型企業，並發掘具成長潛力的標的。
• 根據彭博與晨星資料，近十年來，表現排名前四分之一的台股主動式基金，展現出顯著的超額報酬能力。
• 00403A以市值前50大企業為核心配置，並將選股範圍延伸至第51至200大企業，預計4月22日至24日募集。
news.Keywords: ETF,主動式管理,市值,選股策略,資產配置

news.Title: 伊朗談判曙光，台股跟隨美股強勢反彈
news.Content: 【財訊快報／黃啟乙】伊朗釋出願意與美國談判的消息後，美 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 伊朗釋出願意與美國談判的消息後，美股週二率先強彈而上，帶動台股及亞洲股市今日全面性反攻，顯示市場風險偏好短線回升。
• 展望後市，股市波動仍將高度依賴美伊談判進展，投資人需持續關注談判消息對市場心理的影響。
• 油價仍是重要參考指標，布蘭特原油價格目前仍維持在100美元以上，反映談判過程中仍存在不確定性與短期起伏。
• 儘管週三股市已強勢彈升，但隨著談判進展，股市仍可能出現波動，進入4月份之後，市場或將迎來相對樂觀的結果。
news.Keywords: 地緣政治,股市反彈,談判進展,油價,市場情緒

news.Title: Better Artificial Intelligence Stock: Palantir vs. Oracle
news.Content: The artificial intelligence (AI) industry experienced upheaval in 2026. Wall Street soured on many AI stocks, but this creates opportunities for investors looking at the long term. Two AI businesses to consider investing in are Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) and Oracle (NYSE: ORCL) . The former gained prominence providing data analytics to government intelligence agencies, while the latter began ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Palantir's Q4 2025 revenue increased by 70% year-over-year to $1.4 billion, driven by its Artificial Intelligence Platform (AIP).
• Oracle's fiscal Q3 2026 revenue rose 22% year-over-year to $17.2 billion, with remaining performance obligations (RPO) totaling $553 billion, up 325% YoY.
• Palantir has no debt and total assets of $8.9 billion against $1.4 billion in liabilities at the end of 2025.
• Oracle has accumulated over $130 billion in debt to fund its cloud expansion.
• Despite Palantir's high P/S ratio, its stronger sales growth and financial health make it a preferred AI investment over Oracle.
news.Keywords: AI platform, cloud computing, revenue growth, valuation, balance sheet

news.Title: 【Hot台股】大盤狂漲1416點散戶動彈不得？網憂「川普：愚人節快樂」  專家：保留3成現金為宜
news.Content:
今日社群台股最Hot議題

「川普：愚人節快樂」「去年清明節變盤，今年愚人節，都是翻身的機會」「開盤噴千點 收盤愚人節」「大家都變聰明了嗎？量這麼少，都沒人買了喔」「大盤怎麼跟死魚一樣O.O」「台股世界強啊」「小散戶幾 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊戰事緊張情勢終露曙光，伊朗總統首度鬆口「願結束戰爭」，美國總統川普也暗示戰事可能不會持續太久，激勵台股今（1）日加權指數大漲1416.92點至33,139.91點。
• 永誠國際投顧分析師李忠興指出，此波反彈除了受惠於美股走強或地緣政治降溫，關鍵在於前一日融資大幅減肥，市場浮額已有效清洗。
• 李忠興認為，當前情勢與去年明顯不同，技術面中期趨勢仍偏多，短線若因利空拉回，反而是偏多思考下的布局機會。
• 操作策略上，建議投資人保留3成現金因應震盪，留意個股強弱分化，強勢股可續抱甚至逢低布局。
news.Keywords: 地緣政治,股市反彈,籌碼清洗,技術分析,操作策略

news.Title: TSMC plans 3-nanometre chip production launch in Japan in 2028
news.Content: By Wen-Yee Lee TAIPEI, April 1 (Reuters) - TSMC, the world's largest contract chipmaker, is expected to launch ‌equipment installation and mass production of 3-nanometre wafers ...
news.AI_Summary:
• TSMC plans to launch equipment installation and mass production of 3-nanometre chips at its second factory in Japan in 2028.
• The second Japanese fab will have a monthly production capacity of 15,000 12-inch wafers using advanced 3-nanometre process technology.
• Total investment in TSMC's first and second fabs in Japan is expected to exceed $20 billion, with a combined monthly capacity of 100,000 wafers using less advanced technologies.
• TSMC's first fab in Japan began volume production in late 2024.
• Minority investors in TSMC's Japan unit include Sony Semiconductor Solutions Corporation, DENSO Corporation, and Toyota Motor Corporation.
news.Keywords: semiconductor manufacturing, advanced process technology, capital investment, global expansion, supply chain

news.Title: 〈焦點股〉台股重返3萬3 元大00631L分割後爆量強彈逾8%
news.Content: 伊朗總統釋出結束戰爭意願，停戰現曙光帶動全球股市全面回彈，台股今 (1) 日由權值股領軍強彈，大漲近 1400 點，站回 3 萬 ...
news.AI_Summary:

• 元大台灣 50 正 2(00631L-TW) 甫完成分割恢復交易，成交金額強勢攻進 ETF 排行榜前三，漲幅飆破 8%。
• 法人表示，00631L 為追蹤台灣 50 指數單日報酬正向 2 倍，具槓桿效果其漲幅、反彈表現比原型 0050 還亮眼。
• 法人指出，目前台股在季線附近獲題材面支撐，若後續美伊兩國訊息保持正向，以目前台股指標企業獲利預估，要再突破新高機率不小。

news.Title: 中國手機晶片庫存修正，美系外資調降聯發科、京元電、聯電目標價
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者劉居全報導】美系外資在最新出爐的報告中表示，記憶體成本上漲影響中國智慧型手機需求，導致供應鏈訂單削減，根據最新供應鏈調查顯示 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美系外資報告指出，記憶體成本上漲影響中國智慧型手機需求，導致供應鏈訂單削減。
• 聯發科(2454)與高通在內的智慧手機SoC供應商，已開始下修在台積電(2330)4奈米製程的投片訂單，預估減幅達2萬-3萬片晶圓，出貨量下修約1500萬至2000萬顆。
• 美系外資同步調降聯發科、京元電子(2449)、聯電(2303)目標價，其中聯發科目標價由2088元下修至1988元。
• 美系外資強調台積電受影響有限，主要是AI及網通等客戶已快速承接釋出的4奈米產能。
news.Keywords: 手機晶片,庫存修正,外資報告,目標價下修,AI需求

news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】SEMI國際半導體產業協會，透過旗下SEMI矽光子產業聯盟（SEMI Silicon Photonics Industry Alliance, SiPhIA）舉辦「矽光 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SEMI論壇解析矽光子量產關鍵，台積電(2330)COUPE平台的電子積體電路與光子積體電路進行異質整合堆疊，預計按計劃將於今年進入量產階段。
• 隨著AI算力需求持續爆發，資料中心對高速光互連架構的需求急遽攀升，預測2026年矽光子模組銷售佔比將超過五成。
• 台積電先進封裝整合四處處長侯上勇表示，CPO技術推進需要供應鏈各環節協同創新。
• 台積電期待透過SiPhIA的跨企業協作框架，與產業夥伴共同推進矽光子封裝技術標準建立與量產落地。
news.Keywords: 台積電,矽光子,AI數據中心,先進封裝,CPO

news.Title: 威盛：微捷創研與華立捷進行股份轉換案，基準日暫訂為6/16
news.Content:

(2388)威盛-代子公司微捷創研及華立捷公告董事會決議股份轉換案

1.併購種類(如合併、分割、收購或股份受讓):代子公司公告股份轉換

2.事實發生日:115/3/31

3.參與併購公司名稱(如合併另一方公司、分 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 威盛(2388)代子公司微捷創研及華立捷公告董事會決議股份轉換案，預計6月16日為基準日。
• 本次股份轉換案為子公司間依據企業併購法等相關法令，由微捷創研增發新股，以股份轉換方式取得華立捷全部已發行股份。
• 併購目的為加強雙方更緊密的運作以提高綜效，整合雙方資源、發揮規模經濟綜效，並提供客戶更完整供應鏈服務。
• 換股比例為微捷創研每1股普通股交換華立捷普通股4股，會計師評估交換比例尚屬合理。
news.Keywords: 併購,股份轉換,子公司,綜效,供應鏈

news.Title: 3 Tech Stocks That Are Growing Revenue Faster Than Nvidia
news.Content: Nvidia has become the most notable stock success story in the current artificial intelligence (AI) boom. Last year, the company had reported several quarters of triple-digit revenue growth, a notable accomplishment for a company with a $4 trillion market cap. Even in the current quarter, revenue grew by an astounding 73% from a year ago. This feat is difficult to match even for much smaller companies ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology reported $23.9 billion in revenue for fiscal Q2 2026, a 196% growth rate, driven by high-bandwidth memory (HBM) for AI applications.
• Analysts predict 191% revenue growth for Micron in the current fiscal year, with its stock up 260% over the last year.
• CoreWeave's Q4 revenue reached almost $1.6 billion, a 110% increase, driven by its AI-native cloud platform, with a backlog of $67 billion.
• Nebius Group's Q4 revenue of $228 million saw a 547% increase, driven by its AI-focused cloud platform.
• While Nebius Group has a strong financial position with $3.8 billion in cash and $4.1 billion in debt, its P/S ratio of 41 and recent stock surge may limit near-term upside.
news.Keywords: revenue growth, AI infrastructure, memory chips, cloud platform, valuation

news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】記憶體大廠Kioxia於2026年3月31日發布EOL（產品終止供應）通知，宣布將停止供 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 記憶體大廠Kioxia於2026年3月31日發布EOL通知，將停止供應包括15奈米、24奈米與32奈米的製程，及BiCS Flash第三代在內的多項NAND Flash產品。
• SLC等的台資NAND晶片供應商華邦電(2344)和旺宏(2337)，將可受益。
• Kioxia此舉是為將資源集中於更高層數3D NAND與先進產品。
• 華邦電與旺宏主攻SLC等非高階NAND晶片，Kioxia退出意味著供應減少，晶片報價可望因產出減少而上漲。
news.Keywords: 記憶體,NAND Flash,EOL,華邦電,旺宏

news.Content:

經濟部投資審議會昨(3/31)日核准1件僑外投資、6件對外投資以及1件對中國投資，合計8件重大投資案件，其中包含台積電(2330)以300億美元增資資英屬維京群 ...

• 月產能達15,000片的12吋晶圓，預計自2028年開始進行設備安裝設定及開始晶圓量產。
• 投審會亦核准台積電以300億美元增資資英屬維京群島TSMC GLOBAL，主要投資於銀行定期存款與美金債券。
• 此舉顯示台積電持續擴張先進製程產能，以滿足市場需求。

news.Content: By Aditya Soni and Akash Sriram April 1 (Reuters) - In early 1976 in California, Steve Wozniak had just completed the design of a computer circuit board he intended to share with fellow hobbyists at a prominent local club. His friend ‌Steve Jobs also saw a business opportunity to manufacture and sell the boards, and thus Apple ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple is facing pressure to demonstrate its continued relevance in the age of artificial intelligence, with rivals Alphabet and Microsoft investing heavily.
• Apple's stock has been the second-worst performer among the 'Magnificent Seven' since the launch of ChatGPT in November 2022.
• Analysts and investors suggest Apple was unprepared for the consumer adoption of AI, citing delays in features like a revamped Siri.
• Despite AI challenges, strong demand for the iPhone 17 series and the MacBook Neo contributed to Apple's recent earnings.
• Apple is projected to post sales of $465 billion in its ongoing fiscal year ending in September.

news.Title: AI Data Centers Are Choking on Memory: Is Micron a Buy After Its Monster Run?
news.Content: Shares of Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) have soared over the past year due to a shortage of high-performance memory for data centers. The company could see strong financial performance over the next few years, as demand remains well above supply. The key question investors need to answer before buying Micron today is whether ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron's revenue tripled year-over-year to nearly $24 billion in the recent quarter, with earnings per share rising to $12.07 from $1.41.
• AI computing systems require advanced memory, and the industry is currently unable to meet demand, with Micron fulfilling only 50-67% of customer requests.
• The memory shortage is expected to persist through the end of 2026 and into next year, supporting higher earnings.
• Demand for memory is also growing in consumer devices and emerging applications like humanoid robots.
• Analysts project earnings per share to climb to $58 in fiscal 2026 and $98 in fiscal 2027, before potentially declining to $77 in fiscal 2028, indicating potential cyclicality.
news.Keywords: memory shortage, AI demand, revenue growth, gross margin, cyclical risk

news.Title: AI Data Centers Are Choking on Memory: Is Micron a Buy After Its Monster Run?
news.Content: Shares of Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) have soared over the past year due to a shortage of high-performance memory for data centers. The company could see strong financial performance over the next few years, as demand remains well above supply. The key question investors need to answer before buying Micron today is whether ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron's revenue tripled year-over-year to nearly $24 billion in the recent quarter, with earnings per share rising to $12.07 from $1.41.
• AI computing systems require advanced memory, and the industry is currently unable to meet demand, with Micron fulfilling only 50-67% of customer requests.
• The memory shortage is expected to persist through the end of 2026 and into next year, supporting higher earnings.
• Demand for memory is also growing in consumer devices and emerging applications like humanoid robots.
• Analysts project earnings per share to climb to $58 in fiscal 2026 and $98 in fiscal 2027, before potentially declining to $77 in fiscal 2028, indicating potential cyclicality.
news.Keywords: memory shortage, AI demand, revenue growth, gross margin, cyclical risk

• Palantir's U.S. commercial revenue grew 109% year-over-year to around $1.4 billion in fiscal 2025.

news.Title: Warren Buffett Made a $19.8 Billion Bet and It's Not on AI
news.Content: In his last quarter as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRKB) , legendary investor Warren Buffett made one very large buy. But he didn't buy shares of his largest position Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) , or his longtime holding Bank of America (NYSE: BAC) , or one of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Warren Buffett increased Berkshire Hathaway's stake in Chevron to $19.8 billion by investing over $1 billion.
• Chevron's share price lagged the S&P 500 in 2025, but has since risen 37% year-to-date in 2026.
• The increase in Chevron's stock price is attributed to potential opportunities in Venezuela and soaring global energy prices due to the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.
• Berkshire Hathaway has seen a 58% return on its latest Chevron investment in less than six months.
• Buffett also sold shares of Apple, Bank of America, and Amazon.
news.Keywords: energy sector, strategic investment, commodity prices, portfolio allocation, stock performance

news.Title: Duos Technologies Group Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
news.Content: Key Points Strategic pivot: New CEO Doug Recker said Duos will "completely divest the rail division" within ~60 days and is now fully dedicated to the data center market via its Duos Edge and Duos Technology Solutions units to free resources and cut SG&A. Commercial scale-up: After $45M and $65M capital raises, Duos says it has procured/manufactured 15 edge data centers and will deploy ~2,300 GPUs, including a GPU-as-a-Service contract for 2,304 NVIDIA GPUs expected to generate about $176M over 36 months and a 4.8 MW high-power colocation deal for a hyperscaler. Financial momentum: 2025 revenue rose to roughly $27M ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Duos Technologies Group (DUOT) is strategically pivoting to the data center market, divesting its rail division.
• The company procured/manufactured 15 edge data centers, deploying ~2,300 GPUs, including a $176M GPU-as-a-Service contract with Nvidia.
• 2025 revenue rose ~270% YoY to $27M with a 29% gross margin.
• Duos guided 2026 revenue of $50–$55M and has a pipeline of over $150 million for its new Technology Solutions division.
news.Keywords: data center, GPU deployment, revenue growth, strategic pivot, AI infrastructure

news.Title: Nvidia’s stock split history: Everything you need to know
news.Content: Companies conduct stock splits to allow investors to purchase their shares at a more affordable price. Tech giant and Magnificent 7 leader Nvidia is no exception, having split its stock several times in the more than 25 years it’s been a publicly traded company. If demand for the AI processing leader's shares continues to increase, pushing its stock price up further in the years to come, Nvidia may have to conduct more stock splits. Here’s a history of Nvidia’s stock splits, and a look at how high its share price would be today had it not multiplied ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia has conducted six stock splits in its history, with the most recent being a 10-for-1 split in June 2024.
• Stock splits increase the number of shares available for trading and make the stock more affordable for individual investors.
• Nvidia's stock price would be significantly higher today without these splits.
• Splits can also affect dividends per share and provide flexibility for employee stock options and buybacks.
news.Keywords: stock split, share price, affordability, investor access, corporate actions

news.Title: Mega-cap dividend stock targets $9 trillion valuation
news.Content: Meta Platforms recently disclosed a new stock option plan for its top executives that won't pay out unless the company's market cap skyrockets from roughly $1.36 trillion to $9 trillion by 2031 . That would make Meta worth more than twice Nvidia 's value , currently the world's most valuable company at around $4.1 trillion. For dividend stock investors watching Meta, the new plan provides a signal about where the company is betting its future and how confident it is getting there. Meta's executive compensation plan: the $9 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms (META) has a new stock option plan for executives tied to a market cap target of $9 trillion by 2031.
• This plan signals Meta's confidence in massive future success, potentially making it worth more than twice Nvidia's current value.
• Meta initiated its first-ever dividend in early 2024 and estimates 2026 dividend per share at $2.24, with a 12.6% CAGR through 2030.
• Free cash flow is projected to drop 75.1% in 2026 due to AI infrastructure investments but is expected to more than double by 2028.
news.Keywords: market cap, executive compensation, dividend, free cash flow, AI infrastructure

news.Title: 主動台股ETF打敗大盤 專家：市場短線波動 可留意低接機會
news.Content: 台股3月下挫3,643點，修正幅度達10.42%，不過；採取主動選股策略的主動台股ETF表現都優於大盤指數，其中，有四檔主動式台股ETF跌幅在3%以內，包括：主動統一台股增 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 儘管3月台股指數下挫10.42%，但主動式台股ETF表現優於大盤，其中統一台股增長、台新優勢成長及第一金台股優等ETF今年第一季漲幅達13%-17%。
• 專家指出，科技產業持續推動投資週期，雲端服務公司加碼AI基礎設施，預計今年美國四大CSP資本支出將達6,176億美元，年增約六成，台灣電子產業在高階晶片、伺服器等供應鏈具優勢。
• 預期至2027年前，台灣電子業將持續受惠雲端資本支出循環，營運能見度高、獲利動能強；AI強勁需求延續，預估今、明年台股企業獲利分別成長三成及兩成。
• 專家認為，台股指數短期修正幅度較大，但市場對算力需求不變，美伊戰爭帶來的波動反而提供低接機會；歷史數據顯示，台股大跌後長期而言多數轉為正報酬。

• 自營商亦大賣超2,235.77億元，從外資及自營商動作來看，對行情不利。

news.Title: 台股黑暗3月跌3,691點 法人看4月行情先下後上
news.Content:
中東戰火燒不停，國際油價上揚，持續重挫全球股市，台股昨（31）日在外資殺紅眼、補跌效應、季底結帳效應下，重挫795點收31,722點，32K與季線大關雙雙失守。

總計3月寫下史上最大 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受中東戰火推升國際油價及美股補跌影響，台股3月31日重挫795點，收31,722點，失守32K與季線關卡。
• 3月創下史上最大跌點、最大外資賣超金額、最大八大公股護盤金額等紀錄。
• 展望4月行情，法人預期清明節後短線將醞釀反彈，加上4月16日台積電法說會，有望激勵多頭回歸，漲點上看2,000點至3,000點，行情「先下後上」。
• 三大法人合計3月賣超1.09兆元，為史上首度單月賣超破兆元紀錄；八大公股行庫3月買超2,211億元，寫下單月買超最多。
news.Keywords: 中東戰火,補跌效應,季底結帳,台積電法說會,先下後上

news.Title: Nvidia Just Invested $2 Billion in This Chip Stock. Here's What Investors Should Know
news.Content: News hit today that Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) intends to invest approximately $2 billion in Marvell Technology (NASDAQ: MRVL) . Nvidia's forefront position in AI processors and software development platforms has made the company the single most influential player in the artificial-intelligence space. The distinction lends added importance to investment moves ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) plans to invest approximately $2 billion in Marvell Technology (MRVL), a semiconductor design company specializing in data-center infrastructure.
• Marvell is a leader in ASICs, a technological alternative to Nvidia's GPUs in the AI processing market.
• Nvidia's investment is a bullish indicator, with Marvell's share price surging roughly 13% on the news.
• The companies are also deepening their partnership to develop silicon photonics and other AI-centric telecommunications infrastructure hardware.
news.Keywords: investment, AI hardware, semiconductor, partnership, silicon photonics

news.Title: American Exchange Is Set to Acquire Allbirds for $39 Million. Here's What Investors Need to Know.
news.Content: Allbirds' (Nasdaq: BIRD) fall from grace is now complete. The once-promising footwear maker said after hours Monday that it would sell itself to American Exchange, the owner of Aerosoles, for just $39 million, or roughly ten times less than what it raised in its ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Allbirds will be acquired by American Exchange for $39 million, a fraction of its IPO valuation.
• The footwear maker experienced significant errors, including product line expansion, durability issues, and aggressive retail expansion.
• Allbirds' revenue has steadily eroded since peaking in 2022, with no quarters of positive revenue growth in over three years.
• The company's downfall serves as a lesson on managing growth, brand dilution, and consumer market fickleness.
news.Keywords: acquisition, footwear, revenue decline, brand dilution, consumer market

news.Title: Nvidia’s $2 billion bet reveals its next big target
news.Content: Nvidia ( NVDA ) started as a video game chipmaker, but became so much more thanks to smart investments. Today, along with GPUs, it makes CPUs, networking equipment, and AI inference accelerators. According to the company’s 10-K form , in fiscal year 2026, its networking revenue totaled $31.4 billion. That was a pretty big jump from $13 billion in 2025. The form states: “Revenue from Data Center networking grew 142%, driven by the introduction and continued ramp of NVLink compute fabric for GB200 and GB300 systems and the growth of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia invested $2 billion in Lumentum Holdings (LITE) and Coherent Corp. (COHR), both networking companies focused on silicon photonics.
• Nvidia's networking revenue totaled $31.4 billion in fiscal year 2026, a significant jump from $13 billion in 2025.
• Nvidia is strengthening its position in silicon photonics through partnerships and investments to compete with Broadcom.
• Nvidia also partnered with Marvell Technology (MRVL), investing $2 billion and integrating Marvell's custom AI accelerators into Nvidia's NVLink Fusion platform.
news.Keywords: silicon photonics, networking, investment, strategic partnership, AI infrastructure

news.Title: Stock Market Today, March 31: Tesla Rises Ahead of Delivery Report as Rally Eases Demand Concerns

news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla (TSLA) shares rose 4.64% amid a market rally, a favorable analyst report, and optimism about AI, robotics, and autonomous driving.

news.Title: OpenAI valued at $852 billion in latest funding round ahead of IPO
news.Content: OpenAI ( OPAI.PVT ) on Tuesday announced it closed its latest funding round, raising $122 billion in commitments at a valuation of $852 billion. That’s more than the $110 billion the company said it raised in February when it was valued at $730 billion. In a statement , OpenAI said it is now generating $2 billion in revenue per month, up from $1 billion per quarter in 2024, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• OpenAI closed a funding round with $122 billion in commitments at an $852 billion valuation, up from $730 billion in February.
• OpenAI is generating $2 billion in revenue per month, growing four times faster than Google parent Alphabet and Meta.
• The funding round was led by Amazon ($50B), Nvidia ($30B), and SoftBank ($30B), with participation from Microsoft.
• The capital will fund OpenAI's data-center buildout, estimated at $600 billion by 2030.
news.Keywords: funding round, valuation, revenue growth, data center, AI infrastructure
